ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the match was played */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the match was played */,
  "neutral" INTEGER /* Whether the match was played on neutral ground */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., friendly, league, cup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's manager */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "former_teams" TEXT /* List of former teams coached */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the tournament's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "photo" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches_players" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "substitution_time" INTEGER /* Time of substitution if applicable */,
  "starting_lineup" INTEGER /* Whether the player started the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of shots taken */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
